CREATE TABLE SER_UDT (A INT, B STRING, C FLOAT);
INSERT INTO SER_UDT (A, B, C) VALUES (1, 'Test1', 1.5);
INSERT INTO SER_UDT (A, B, C) VALUES (2, 'Test2', 2.5);
INSERT INTO SER_UDT (A, B, C) VALUES (3, 'Test3', 3.5);
DECLARE inst SER_UDT;
inst := new SER_UDT();
inst := udt_set(inst, 'A', 30);
RETURN inst.A;
SELECT A FROM SER_UDT WHERE A = (SELECT MAX(A) FROM SER_UDT);
SELECT B, A FROM SER_UDT WHERE A IN (SELECT A FROM SER_UDT WHERE C > 2.0);
UPDATE SER_UDT SET A = (SELECT MAX(A) FROM SER_UDT) WHERE B = 'Test1';
DELETE FROM SER_UDT WHERE A NOT IN (SELECT A FROM SER_UDT WHERE C < 3.0);
CREATE TABLE Additional_UDT (X INT, Y STRING);
INSERT INTO Additional_UDT (X, Y) VALUES (10, 'Extra1');
INSERT INTO Additional_UDT (X, Y) VALUES (20, 'Extra2');
SELECT A, B FROM SER_UDT JOIN Additional_UDT ON SER_UDT.A = Additional_UDT.X WHERE SER_UDT.A < 3;
DECLARE new_inst SER_UDT;
new_inst := new SER_UDT();
new_inst := udt_set(new_inst, 'C', 3.14);
RETURN new_inst.C;
